title: pr-controller config.local.json
description: Persistent local config for pr-controller (gitignored). Precedence: PRC_* env > config.local.json > the selected profile. All keys optional; env can supply anything omitted.

_note.description: Free-form note; ignored by the app.

profile.description: Profile selected by default (PRC_PROFILE / PRC_DEV override). A key in `profiles`, or a built-in (prod | dev).

profiles.description: Named profiles. The selected one supplies default host/owner/login/onlyPRs.

host.description: GitHub host — github.com or an enterprise host. (PRC_HOST)

login.description: Account whose open PRs to watch. (PRC_LOGIN)

onlyPRs.description: Whitelist. Empty/omitted = ALL your open non-draft PRs (normal production). A list = exactly those (testing/dev). (PRC_ONLY_PRS)

cloneRoot.description: ABSOLUTE path to your local clones (no ~). (PRC_CLONE_ROOT)

gitProtocol.description: Transport for cloning a repo you don't have locally. (PRC_GIT_PROTOCOL)

reenrichFloor.description: Force a full re-enrich every Kth scan (default 5). (PRC_REENRICH_FLOOR)
